notableEvents.label: Tyler Soderstrom GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Soderstrom grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman José Fermín. Shea Langeliers out at 2nd. Tyler Soderstrom out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Masyn Winn reaches on a throwing error by pitcher Jacob Lopez. Masyn Winn to 3rd. Masyn Winn advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by second baseman Jeff McNeil.

notableEvents.label: 2 throwing errors
notableEvents.detail: Masyn Winn reaches on a throwing error by pitcher Jacob Lopez. Masyn Winn to 3rd. Masyn Winn advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by second baseman Jeff McNeil.

notableEvents.label: Colby Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colby Thomas singles on a ground ball to left fielder Nathan Church. Jeff McNeil to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Michael Stefanic pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Stefanic grounds out, shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman José Fermín.

notableEvents.label: Masyn Winn reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Masyn Winn reaches on a throwing error by pitcher Jacob Lopez. Masyn Winn to 3rd. Masyn Winn advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by second baseman Jeff McNeil.

notableEvents.label: Nathan Church GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Church grounds into a double play, shortstop Darell Hernaiz to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Yohel Pozo out at 2nd. Nathan Church out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Alec Burleson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Alec Burleson flies out to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom.

notableEvents.label: JJ Wetherholt plunked
notableEvents.detail: JJ Wetherholt hit by pitch. Thomas Saggese to 2nd.
